overall.description: A cinematic exploration of a futuristic luxury sports car in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning with exterior views in a modern covered garage and transitioning to a detailed tour of the opulent black leather interior with gold accents and ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury residential garage with vehicle display

events.description: car door opens and camera enters the vehicle interior

agents.ego_description: walking slowly alongside the futuristic sports car, examining its sleek black exterior and aerodynamic design

entered.detail: sleek black hypercar with angular design and reflective surface
modern covered parking area with dark ceiling and recessed lighting
tropical palm trees visible through the open garage entrance
reflective white marble flooring with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera moves smoothly along the left side of a futuristic black sports car parked in a modern luxury garage. Palm trees and bright daylight are visible through the open entrance, contrasting with the shaded interior. The polished marble floor reflects the vehicle and overhead lighting as the camera approaches the driver's side door.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury vehicle interior with ambient lighting

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal sunroof with natural sunlight streaming into the cabin

agents.ego_description: examining the luxurious interior details including quilted leather seats, gold trim, and futuristic dashboard controls

entered.detail: black leather seats with diamond stitching pattern and gold accent lines
metallic gold trim lines running along the interior panels and seats
futuristic center console with metallic controls and gear selector
sleek dashboard with integrated digital displays and wood trim
large glass sunroof showing sky and palm trees when viewed from below

segments.scene_description: Inside the vehicle, the camera pans across the opulent interior featuring black quilted leather seats with gold stitching and metallic accents. The ambient lighting highlights the luxurious materials as the camera explores the center console, door panels, and dashboard. Natural light streams through the sunroof, briefly revealing the sky and palm trees outside as the camera tilts upward before continuing to survey the cabin's futuristic design elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sleek exterior of a futuristic sports car in a luxury garage to an intimate exploration of its opulent interior. It begins by gliding along the left side of the black vehicle, where the polished marble floor reflects the overhead lighting and bright daylight spills in from an open entrance lined with palm trees. As the camera reaches the driver's side door, the perspective shifts seamlessly inside the cabin to pan across black quilted leather seats accented with gold stitching and metallic details. The scene then expands to survey the center console and dashboard under soft ambient lighting, before tilting upward toward the sunroof to briefly reveal the sky and palm trees outside. Finally, the camera descends back into the cabin to complete its detailed tour of the vehicle's futuristic design elements.
